---
id: update-data-studio
title: "Update a Studio"
description: "Updates the given Studio session ID. Can only update non-running Studios."
sidebar_label: "Update a Studio"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: platform-api//seqera-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update a Studio"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/studios/{sessionId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



Updates the given Studio session ID. Can only update non-running Studios.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
